title: Nephrodium ferrugineum
taxonomy: Nephrodium ferrugineum is a genus of ferns. It belongs to the family Osmundaceae. The genus is part of the class Polypodiopsida. Within the class, it is ranked under the subclass Polypodiidae. Its classification is still studied and confirmed in the scientific community.
